pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 16, export_result.sh line 7, task description
setup_task.sh line 68 generates NACA 2412 with chord=100.0; NACA standards confirm 100mm chord
Task description: 'extruding (padding) the profile 200 mm along the normal axis'; verifier.py line 34 TARGET_SPAN = 200.0
NACA 2412 standard: last two digits '12' mean 12% thickness ratio. Verified via NACA airfoil standards (Wikipedia, airfoiltools.com). Calculated max thickness: 12.15mm / 100mm chord = 0.1215 ≈ 0.12
verifier.py line 39: TOLERANCE_VOL = 0.10 (10% tolerance). Metadata claims 0.05 (5%), but implementation uses 0.10 (10%)

privileged_info_summary: NACA 2412 airfoil with 100mm chord and 200mm span extrusion. Airfoil coordinates are synthetically generated using the NACA 4-digit formula with parameters: 2% camber at 40% chord position, 12% thickness ratio. Calculated planform area ~821 mm², resulting in volume ~164,266 mm³. File saved as wing_section.FCStd. Expected output filename, chord, span, and thickness ratio all verified. NOTE: volume_tolerance metadata (0.05) contradicts verifier implementation (0.10).
